user_query: I'm organizing a company retreat and I need to book travel arrangements for all the employees. Can you assist me in finding the best flight options for our destination? Additionally, I need to check the departure board for train services at our destination. Please provide me with the train departure times and destinations.

TaskList.description: Gather the list of employees who need travel arrangements.
Research and find available flight options for the specified destination and dates.
Check for the available train services and their departure times at the destination.
Compile the flight options and train schedules into a report for the company.
